elements.title: Bolt Creek fire
elements.contents: ... that, on some days during the Bolt Creek fire (smoke pictured), IQAir ranked the air quality in the Seattle area as among the worst in the world?

elements.title: the first victim
elements.contents: ... that the first victim of spree killer Andrew Cunanan was interviewed on CBS News in 1993 to share his opinion on the proposed "don't ask, don't tell" policy?

elements.title: 2001 Liechtenstein general election
elements.contents: ... that the underperformance of the liberalized telephone system was a major issue in the 2001 Liechtenstein general election?

elements.title: Joe Haering
elements.contents: ... that Arena Football League coach Joe Haering once punched the league's president?

elements.title: Thomas family murders
elements.contents: ... that the French state was found guilty of negligence after the Thomas family murders?

elements.title: We Cast a Shadow
elements.contents: ... that the novel We Cast a Shadow has been called an allegory for the struggles of marginalized people in America?

elements.title: Horizon Forbidden West: Burning Shores
elements.contents: ... that Metacritic promised stricter moderation tools after Horizon Forbidden West: Burning Shores faced a coordinated review bombing campaign over an optional same-sex kiss?

elements.title: Sulaiman Binol
elements.contents: ... that Indonesian diplomat Sulaiman Binol reportedly received his posting in Tokyo due to his wife's lobbying?

elements.title: filler episode
elements.contents: ... that a filler episode may not be considered filler?
